params.name: Reynard the Fox
params.description:
On Feb 28, 1107 AD, the story of Reynard the Fox began to spread among the people.
Reynard the Fox is a fairy tale adapted and compiled by French writer Madame d'Aulnoy, whose content originates from a long narrative poem circulated in medieval France among folk tales. The story tells about Reynard the Fox interacting with the inhabitants of the animal kingdom, using his wit to pursue profit and avoid harm, manipulating the strong and the weak alike.
